---
name: Documentation improvement
description: Propose a small public-safe documentation improvement
title: "Improve docs: <short topic>"
labels: []
assignees: []
---

## Goal

Describe the documentation improvement in one or two sentences.

## Scope

What public-safe document should be updated?

Examples:

- `README.md`
- `CHANGELOG.md`
- `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- `public_proof_manifest.md`
- `safe_public_scope.md`
- `redaction_checklist.md`

## Why This Helps

Explain how this improves clarity, navigation, review discipline, or safety.

## Safety Boundary

Confirm this change will not include:

- [ ] private architecture
- [ ] internal names
- [ ] product mechanics
- [ ] detailed workflows
- [ ] customer strategy
- [ ] market positioning
- [ ] private prompts
- [ ] proprietary methods
- [ ] broker or execution details
- [ ] customer data
- [ ] performance claims
- [ ] financial advice claims
- [ ] production readiness claims

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The change is small and reviewable.
- [ ] The change improves public documentation clarity.
- [ ] The change stays high-level and non-sensitive.
- [ ] CI remains passing.
